mapper.select: SELECT * FROM task_module WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT * FROM task_module WHERE status = 'SUCCESS' AND keep_alive_until IS NOT NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE task_module SET status = #{status}, port = #{port}, pid = #{pid}, pgid = #{pgid}, log_file = #{logFile}, build_log_file = #{buildLogFile}, swagger_url = #{swaggerUrl}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, keep_alive_until = #{keepAliveUntil}, started_at = #{startedAt}, finished_at = #{finishedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
